zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bowyer於1561年8月22日在英國米德萊可倫敦受洗時，她的父親Francis Bowyer I36歲，母親Elizabeth Tyllesworth34歲。她於1577年2月11日與Sir Henry Anderson在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年7月9日在她的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bowyer于1561年8月22日在英国米德萊可倫敦受洗时，她的父亲Francis Bowyer I36岁，母亲Elizabeth Tyllesworth34岁。她于1577年2月11日与Sir Henry Anderson在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1599年7月9日在她的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易。

nameMeanings.name: Bowyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

variants.name: Bowman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for an archer, hunter or soldier armed with a bow, from Middle English bow(e)man, bouman (from Old English boga ‘bow’ + mann ‘man’). This word was distinguished from Bowyer , which denoted a maker or seller of bows.
Americanized form of German   Baumann   or the Dutch cognate   Bouwman  .

variants.name: Bouyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Frederique, Monique, Napoleon.
French (southern): regional variant of   Bouvier  . Compare   Beyea  .

variants.name: Boyers
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bowyer was christened on 22 August 1561, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Francis Bowyer I, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, was 34. She married Sir Henry Anderson on 11 February 1577, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 9 July 1599, in her hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bowyer a été baptisée le 22 août 1561, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Francis Bowyer I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Anderson le 11 février 1577, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 juillet 1599, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bowyer am 22. August 1561 in London, Middlesex, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Francis Bowyer I 36 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Tyllesworth 34. Sie hat am 11. Februar 1577 in London, Middlesex, England Sir Henry Anderson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Juli 1599 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bowyer è stato battezzato il 22 agosto 1561 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Francis Bowyer I, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Anderson il 11 febbraio 1577, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 luglio 1599, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomero: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이
ko.St Olave Old Jewry, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bowyer(이)가 1561년 8월 22일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Bowyer I(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Tyllesworth(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1577년 2월 11일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Sir Henry Anderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 7월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bowyer foi batizada em 22 de agosto de 1561, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Bowyer I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Anderson em 11 de fevereiro de 1577, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de julho de 1599, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bowyer была крещена 22 августа 1561 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Francis Bowyer I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tyllesworth, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Anderson 11 февраля 1577 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 9 июля 1599 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности ст олав олд джюри вит ст мартинь помирои, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Bowyer se bautizó el 22 de agosto de 1561, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Francis Bowyer I, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir Henry Anderson el 11 de febrero de 1577, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de julio de 1599, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
